亲子.description: Traveling with children (infants/kids included) / 带小孩出行（含婴儿/儿童）
soft_hints: At least one child/infant in party; prioritize airlines' baggage allowance and child-ticket policy
Prefer daytime direct flights; transfer waits must be comfortable

商务.description: Business trip / meeting / 出差/商务会议
soft_hints: Schedule stability first; watch on-time rate
Short trips often mean early out / late back

学生.description: Student or budget-sensitive / 学生或预算敏感
soft_hints: Price first; red-eye and transfers are acceptable

老人.description: Traveling with seniors (incl. accompanying parents) / 老人出行（含陪父母）

蜜月.description: Honeymoon / vacation / 蜜月/度假旅行
soft_hints: Experience first; acceptable to pay for upgrade
